text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: During summer camp...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Hey, Trainer! Do you have time tonight?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: The thing is...

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text: Oh, it's Mayano. ☆

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Oh, Marvey! Heyo! ☆

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text: Haha. It's marvelous to see you. ☆ What's up? ★

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
(This is Marvelous Sunday. She's a pal of Mayano
Top Gun's who debuted at the same time.)

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Let's go to the festival tonight. ☆ I've invited
Nature as well.★

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Hey, now hold on just a minute, whippersnapper. I
didn't say I'd go.

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Little details like that don't matter! ☆ Anyway,
what time should we meet up, Mayano?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Oh, um... Actually...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
I think I'll pass this time! I'm gonna do some secret
training with my trainer tonight!

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text: Huh?!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Is that so?
choice_data_list: When did I say yes to that?
When did I say yes to that?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: You were just about to!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Nature, Marvey, you two have fun at the festival
without me!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Let's go, Trainer! ♪

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Oh my... It looks like our twinkly young friend is
quite passionate about her trainer.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Hello? Marvelous?

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text: How maaarvelous!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Wah?!

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Mayano is so wonderfully marvelous! ☆ She just
showed me a new way to be marvelous! ★

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Come again?

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Nature! We have to follow her lead! We need to
train so she doesn't surpass us!

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
We must strike while the iron is marvelously
hot! ☆ Let's go!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Wh-what?! D-don't drag me into this!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Pant... Huff...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Ok, that's three sets down! What's next, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Fyuuuuu!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Hm? What was that?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: BAM! BOOM, BOOM!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Oh! It's fireworks! Look, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Haha! They must be pretty big for us to be able
to see them from here.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe. I wonder how pretty they'd be from up
close.
choice_data_list: You wanted to go to that festival after all, huh?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: ...Nope! I'm totally okay.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: I can go to the festival some other time.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Once I've made your heart flutter after I win the
Kikuka Sho, that is!
choice_data_list: You'll have to work hard if you want to win.
You'll have to work hard if you want to win.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Once I've made your heart flutter after I win the
Kikuka Sho, that is!
choice_data_list: You'll have to work hard if you want to win.
You'll have to work hard if you want to win.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Wha?! Really? But...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: I haven't made it flutter enough! I can do better!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna make you fall in love with me so hard
you won't be able to live without me!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Heh! You'd better look forward to it, Trainer! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Saying this, Mayano Top Gun takes off running
on the beach once more.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Hmph. I'll have you know I already got that race
in the bag. ♪

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
I'm in the middle of a growth spurt, y'know! It's
only a matter of time.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
I'll win the Kikuka Sho and any other race! You'll
totally be entranced by me!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
When we come back next summer, I'm gonna give
you the most grown-up present on this beach...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Fyuuu! BOOOOOM!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Huh? They're still going off?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Why're you interrupting me with all your boom, boom, booms?! Read the room!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: BOOOOOM!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Sigh... The atmosphere was so good just now! Geez!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mayano Top Gun furiously stomps up and down,
directing her rage at the fireworks...
